questions.text: Which of these is a consequence of deforestation?
questions.explanation: Deforestation leads to soil erosion as tree roots no longer hold the soil. It also causes loss of biodiversity.
Water is renewable through the water cycle. However, freshwater is limited and must be conserved.

questions.text: What is the main cause of air pollution?
questions.correctAnswer: Burning of fossil fuels, industrial emissions, and vehicle exhaust.
questions.explanation: Air pollution is mainly caused by burning fossil fuels (coal, petroleum), industrial emissions, and vehicle exhaust releasing harmful gases.

questions.text: The process of cleaning water to make it fit for drinking is called ________.
questions.explanation: Water purification removes contaminants to make water safe for drinking and other uses.
